detail-1.title: About Us
detail-1.description: YONG is a one-stop shop for all vending solutions in India. As one of the oldest and most trusted vending machine suppliers in the country with over 20 years of experience, we take pride in being the preferred choice for India's largest companies and vending machine operators. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our premium quality machines and exceptional service and support.

detail-2.title: Our mission
detail-2.description: Making everyday convenience available- Easier, Smarter, Safer! Staying Consumer Centric, Data led and Values based in everything we do.

detail-3.title: Our vision
detail-3.description: To be the foremost in the Vending Machine industry and allied.

detail-5.title: Our expertise
detail-5.description: With over 10 years of experience, we've built a reputation for delivering reliable vending machines, robust software, and exceptional customer service. From small businesses to large corporations, we've partnered with clients globally to create customized vending solutions that drive success.

detail-6.title: Unique selling point
detail-6.point-2: Advanced IoT-enabled systems and analytics software.
detail-6.point-4: Commitment to sustainability and energy-efficient technology.

detail-7.title: Core Values
detail-7.point-1: Integrity: We conduct our business with honesty and transparency.
detail-7.point-2: Innovation: We continually seek new ways to improve our products and services.
detail-7.point-3: Customer-Centricity: Our customers are at the heart of everything we do.
detail-7.point-4: Sustainability: We are committed to environmentally friendly practices in our operations.

detail-10.title: Commitment to Innovation
detail-10.description: At Yong Enterprises, we are dedicated to integrating cutting-edge technology into our products. Our team stays ahead of industry trends, ensuring that we provide clients with the most advanced vending solutions available.

detail-11.title: Customer Focus
detail-11.description: We believe in building strong relationships with our clients. Our customer-centric approach has led to numerous success stories. Here's what some of our satisfied clients have to say:

feedback-1.feedback: We partnered with Yong for our office vending needs, and the results have been phenomenal. Their customized solutions, paired with IoT integration, have streamlined our operations while providing employees with quick, convenient access to snacks and beverages. Highly recommended!

feedback-2.feedback: We've been using refurbished vending machines from Yong, and they are as good as new! The cost savings have been incredible, and the profit-sharing model with FMCG companies like Amul and Nandini has boosted our revenue significantly

feedback-3.feedback: The corporate bulk vending solutions offered by Yong exceeded our expectations. Their white-label service allowed us to showcase our branding seamlessly while ensuring high-quality service for our clients.

feedback-4.feedback: What sets Yong apart is their dedication to customer satisfaction. Their maintenance plans are comprehensive and reliable, keeping all our machines running smoothly. It's rare to find a company this committed to excellence.

feedback-5.feedback: Starting a vending business was a breeze with Yong. Their guidance, top-notch machines, and transparent rental plans made the process hassle-free. I'm already seeing great returns!

about.title: About Incinerator
about.desc: Incinerators are advanced waste disposal systems that burn waste at high temperatures to reduce it to ash. GOMYWASTE incinerators provide an eco-friendly and cost-effective solution for handling both dry and wet waste without fuel, ensuring efficient waste management.

list.f2: Supports both dry and wet waste (70:30 ratio)
list.f7: Can be installed on ground or rooftop

list.s6: Separate doors for loading and ash collection

about.title: About Modular Toilets

vendingmachine.title: Automatic Snacks & Beverages Vending Machine
vendingmachine.description: Smart, automated vending solution providing snacks and beverages with convenience, hygiene, and efficiency.

about.title: About Us
about.desc: YONG is a one-stop shop for vending solutions in India with over 10 years of experience. We provide high-quality vending machines with excellent service and support. Our vending solutions offer a quick and convenient way for people to grab snacks and beverages on the go, improving productivity and staff satisfaction.

points.p1: Best quality machines in the market
points.p8: Customized vending machines for specific projects

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: To be the foremost in the vending machine industry and allied categories.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: Making everyday convenience available – Easier, Smarter, Safer! Staying consumer-centric, data-led, and values-based in everything we do.

features.title: Features
features.desc: Our vending machines are equipped with advanced cashless payment systems and smart automation. The plug-and-play payment device supports UPI and other digital payments with secure transactions. The system provides a user-friendly interface, instant refunds on failure, and ensures hygienic, touch-free dispensing. Designed for Indian market needs, it offers reliability, efficiency, and minimal operating costs.

tray.title: Tray Structure
tray.desc: The vending machine is designed with a total of 6 trays for efficient product organization and dispensing.

details.d1: 3 trays for snacks (each tray has 4 spirals, each spiral holds up to 12 snack items)
details.d2: 1 tray for chocolates & biscuits (8 spirals, each spiral holds up to 18 chocolates or 10 biscuits)
details.d3: 2 trays for beverages (7 spirals, each spiral holds up to 7 beverage items)

tray.note: Tray configuration can be customized based on customer requirements.
